title: March 30th, 2021
body:
daily notes

work

when phil tells me that i don't have to tell people about my illness, i can appreciate all of the reasonably expected harms such offering is meant to protect me against. what i don't know if phil understands is that that's exactly the posture that leads me to feeling more isolated from the group than people who don't feel like they have to hide as much of themselves to feel safe

professional

you're not (why)

lyrics

professional
